posts.author: jscottsmith (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
For each given job, I’m trying to show the following:

Original cost estimate
Actual cost (In-scope)
Actual cost (Out-of-scope)

Monday is being very particular about which columns it will show and in which combinations. What am I doing wrong?
